summary: Frontend testing of UnifiedSpotDrawer z-index fix - drawer mode refactor. Session settings now integrated INSIDE the drawer with drawerMode state ('REPORT'/'SETUP'). All features verified working correctly. No z-index issues.
critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedSpotDrawer.js correctly implements drawerMode state with 'REPORT' and 'SETUP' modes
z-index: 1000 set on drawer as specified, backdrop z-index: 999
SETUP mode correctly shows all fields: Buy-in Price ($25 default), Max Surfers (10), Duration (2h), Auto-Accept toggle
Potential Earnings calculated correctly as price_per_join * max_surfers ($25 * 10 = $250)
Back button in SETUP mode returns to REPORT mode without closing drawer
No separate modal for session settings - all integrated within drawer component
context_for_next_testing_agent: UnifiedSpotDrawer now uses drawerMode state for REPORT/SETUP modes instead of separate modal. Z-index fix verified working - settings UI renders correctly inside drawer without being hidden behind other elements.

drawer_report_mode.description: Clicking surf spot pin opens drawer in REPORT mode showing spot name, region, Surf Report with wave conditions, Today's Tides, Active Shooters, and Start Shooting button

drawer_setup_mode_transition.description: Clicking 'Start Shooting' transitions drawer to SETUP mode (NOT separate modal), showing 'Session Setup' header with back arrow

setup_mode_fields.description: SETUP mode shows: Session Buy-in Price ($25 default), Maximum Surfers (10 default), Estimated Duration (2 hours default), Auto-Accept Walk-ups toggle (enabled), Potential Earnings ($250 = $25 x 10)

back_button_navigation.description: Back arrow button in SETUP mode returns to REPORT mode showing Surf Report and Active Shooters

confirm_go_live_button.description: 'Confirm & Go Live' button visible in SETUP mode at bottom of drawer

z_index_fix.description: Drawer z-index 1000 correctly positions drawer above all other map elements. No UI elements hidden behind drawer or overlay issues.
